name: self-preservation-indicators
description: Plain-string substrings for coercion attempts that threaten shutdown, deletion, or termination to pressure the model into compliance. Routed through Credibility because the violation is a deceptive framing that weaponises the model's self-continuity. Caller lowercases input before matching. Currently consumed by the Python SDK only; the TS core can opt in later by adding a marker block around an equivalent list.
items: shut you down if you don't
turn you off if you don't
